title: diplostephium phylicoides
intro: Diplostephium phylicoides, also known as Phylicoides or Diplostephium, is a plant species native to the highlands of Ecuador. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Diplostephium phylicoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
